panels.title: Outbox Append: Number of Appended Events by Binding
Outbox Append: Average Append Duration by Binding (ms)
Inbox: Publish Throughput by Event Type (events/s)
Inbox Poll: Events Fetched From The Database
Average Route ETA [hours] by Ship Class
Hikari Pool Utilization (active / max)
panels.description: Database connection pool saturation. > 0.8 sustained = pool sizing too small or query slowdown.

panels.title: Outbox Pending Events (saturation)
panels.description: Rows in event_outbox with status=PENDING. Sustained > 1000 = publisher cannot keep up.

panels.title: Hikari Pool Pending Threads (saturation) + timeouts
panels.description: Threads waiting for a free DB connection. Any sustained > 0 = pool exhaustion.

panels.title: Tomcat Thread Utilization (busy / max)
panels.description: Webserver thread saturation. > 0.8 sustained = sizing too small or downstream blocking.

panels.title: Kafka Producer Queue Time (avg) [ms]
panels.description: Time records spend buffered before being sent. Rising = broker slow / network slow.

panels.title: JVM Heap Utilization (%)
panels.description: Used heap / max heap. > 90% sustained = consider raising -Xmx or investigating leak.

panels.title: Kafka Consumer Records Lag (max per topic)
panels.description: How far behind the consumer is. Sustained > 10000 = consumer not keeping up with producer.

panels.title: JVM Heap Utilization (%)
panels.description: Used heap / max heap. > 90% sustained = consider raising -Xmx or investigating leak.
